creator: jhein@timing.com
text:
This vuxml entry...

http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/e190ca65-3636-11dc-a697-000c6ec775d9.html

... can be updated to apply to *seamonkey* < 1.1.3

All the MFSAs listed there are now shown as fixed for SM 1.1.3 ...

http://www.mozilla.org/projects/security/known-vulnerabilities.html#SeaMonkey
